features.title: OLMo3 150B vanilla training recipe
features.summary: Define a reproducible 150B-token vanilla OLMo3 training schedule, batch, optimizer, checkpoint cadence and distributed resource contract.
features.hypothesis: A shared validated recipe surface can make model-size experiments comparable by holding data, token budget and most training settings constant.
features.design: Resolve global batch 512, sequence length 8192, 35,763 steps, Adam settings, cosine decay inputs, checkpoint interval, TP/PP/CP defaults and RJob resources through a versioned recipe with build/dry-run validation.

delta.summary: Define a reproducible 150B-token vanilla OLMo3 training schedule, batch, optimizer, checkpoint cadence and distributed resource contract.

operations.before: No branch-local structured recipe for smaller vanilla OLMo3 presets
operations.rationale: Hold the training/data/resource contract explicit so size-specific model configurations can be reviewed independently.

commits.summary: Initial shared 1B/3B schedule and resource configuration.

analysis.conclusion: The recipe is reproducibly specified and dry-run capable, but no parent-relative training outcome is committed.
limitations: The branch is unmerged.
Dry-run/config validation is not training-effect evidence.
No completed 150B run or convergence comparison is available.

evidence.summary: Defines the shared 150B-token schedule, batch, optimizer and resource defaults for 1B/3B vanilla training.
build_train_config/build_launch_config/validate_config resolve training, data, resources and parallelism.
CLI build/dry-run/launch surface for the resolved recipe.

work-repo.note: Derived private work-repository evidence; never root or official OLMo-3 provenance.

features.title: OLMo3 1B dense preset
features.summary: Define a concrete 1B-class OLMo3 model and coupled launch defaults rather than relying on the aggregate size label.
features.hypothesis: A 16-layer, hidden-2048 OLMo3 configuration can provide a lower-cost vanilla baseline under the shared 150B recipe.
features.design: Set 16 layers, hidden 2048, FFN 8192, 16 query/KV heads, head dimension 128, untied embeddings, LR 4e-4 and 32 H200s while retaining the OLMo3 attention/RoPE/RMSNorm contract.

delta.summary: Define a concrete 1B-class OLMo3 model and coupled launch defaults rather than relying on the aggregate size label.

operations.rationale: Expose the actual model/training diff behind the 1B label.

commits.summary: Structured preset and validated recipe consumption.

analysis.conclusion: The configuration diff and consumption path are explicit; no training result validates quality, stability or cost targets.
limitations: The branch is unmerged.
No 1B training run, checkpoint, loss curve or parent-relative effect artifact is available.

evidence.summary: Introduces the explicit 1B model dimensions and size-specific LR/resource defaults.
OLMO3_DENSE_PRESETS['1B'] resolves 16 layers, hidden 2048, FFN 8192 and 16 attention/KV heads.
RUNTIME_DEFAULTS['1B'] resolves 32 H200s, LR 4e-4 and minimum LR 4e-5.

features.title: OLMo3 3B dense preset
features.summary: Define a concrete 3B-class OLMo3 model and coupled launch defaults rather than relying on the aggregate size label.
features.hypothesis: A 16-layer, hidden-3328 OLMo3 configuration can provide an intermediate vanilla baseline under the shared 150B recipe.
features.design: Set 16 layers, hidden 3328, FFN 13312, 16 query/KV heads, head dimension 208, untied embeddings, LR 3e-4 and 64 H200s while retaining the OLMo3 attention/RoPE/RMSNorm contract.

delta.summary: Define a concrete 3B-class OLMo3 model and coupled launch defaults rather than relying on the aggregate size label.

operations.rationale: Expose the actual model/training diff behind the 3B label.

analysis.conclusion: The configuration diff and consumption path are explicit; no training result validates quality, stability or cost targets.
limitations: The branch is unmerged.
No 3B training run, checkpoint, loss curve or parent-relative effect artifact is available.

evidence.summary: Introduces the explicit 3B model dimensions and size-specific LR/resource defaults.
OLMO3_DENSE_PRESETS['3B'] resolves 16 layers, hidden 3328, FFN 13312 and 16 attention/KV heads.
RUNTIME_DEFAULTS['3B'] resolves 64 H200s, LR 3e-4 and minimum LR 3e-5.

features.title: Segmented encoder–chunk–HLM–fusion–decoder topology
features.summary: Split the standard token Transformer into encoder, chunk compression, HLM concept prediction, fusion and decoder stages.
features.hypothesis: A lower-rate concept stream can augment token modeling when the model exposes explicit encode, concept-predict, fuse and decode stages.
features.design: Define the five-stage information-flow skeleton without absorbing the independently switchable concept representation, quantizer or residual-read routes into this node.

delta.summary: Split the standard token Transformer into encoder, chunk compression, HLM concept prediction, fusion and decoder stages.

operations.after: token encoder -> chunk compression -> HLM concept prediction -> concept fusion -> token decoder
operations.rationale: Define the primary segmented topology while leaving representation and routing choices independently reviewable.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

code_symbols.summary: ConceptLMV2Model.__init__ and ConceptLMV2Model.forward implement the five-stage path.

analysis.conclusion: The segmented topology is directly visible in code, but its isolated model-quality effect is unverified.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

evidence.summary: The first available repository commit is an aggregated ConceptLM V2/V2.1/V2.2-VQ snapshot; it supports six independently reviewed structures without exposing separate introduction commits or ablation results.
ConceptLMV2Model.__init__ and forward implement the segmented encoder/chunk/HLM/fusion/decoder path.

features.summary_zh: 将标准 OLMo3 的单流 token Transformer 改为 token encoder → chunk 压缩 → HLM concept 预测 → concept fusion → token decoder 五段管道，并引入低频概念流。

features.title: HLM concept predictor
features.summary: Add a concept-rate autoregressive Transformer that predicts the next concept vector.
features.hypothesis: Autoregressive prediction over the lower-rate concept sequence can provide useful high-level supervision and states for token decoding.
features.design: Instantiate ConceptPredictorV2 over concept states with its own causal layers, normalization and prediction heads; attention-window and layer-implementation variants evolve beneath this node.

delta.summary: Add a concept-rate autoregressive Transformer that predicts the next concept vector.

operations.after: ConceptPredictorV2 HLM tower with causal layers, final norm and prediction heads
operations.rationale: The HLM is independently configurable and is the semantic parent of D07 and D08.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

code_symbols.summary: ConceptPredictorV2 implements the concept-rate autoregressive HLM tower.

analysis.conclusion: The HLM module is implemented, but no isolated ablation establishes its effect.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

evidence.summary: The first available repository commit is an aggregated ConceptLM V2/V2.1/V2.2-VQ snapshot; it supports six independently reviewed structures without exposing separate introduction commits or ablation results.
ConceptPredictorV2 implements the concept-rate autoregressive predictor.

features.summary_zh: 在概念流中加入负责预测下一个 concept 的小型自回归 Transformer；其序列单元是 concept 向量，序列长度约为 token 流的四分之一。

features.title: HLM backbone-window attention
features.summary: Make the chunk-rate HLM tower follow the backbone sliding/full attention schedule instead of always using full causal attention.
features.hypothesis: The HLM tower can reduce attention cost and align its inductive bias by inheriting the backbone window cadence.
features.design: Add per-layer sliding-window causal bias support and a full/backbone_window mode, then make backbone_window the default.

delta.summary: Make the chunk-rate HLM tower follow the backbone sliding/full attention schedule instead of always using full causal attention.

operations.rationale: Retain an independently switchable full-attention alternative.

analysis.conclusion: The code and default are pinned, but no isolated quality or throughput result is committed.
limitations: No A/B result establishes the effect of HLM windowing.
The concept-window to token receptive-field mapping needs algorithm-owner confirmation.

evidence.summary: Adds causal sliding-window masks and backbone-window configuration to the HLM tower.
Changes the launcher/model default from full HLM attention to backbone_window.

features.title_zh: HLM 注意力继承骨干窗口节奏
features.summary_zh: 将 HLM 内部注意力从每层全因果改为继承 OLMo3 骨干的 local/global 交替节奏，包括 window_size 与 window_attn_skip_freq。

features.title: OLMo3 TransformerBlock reuse in HLM
features.summary: Run HLM layers through the configured OLMo3 TransformerBlock instead of a separate custom causal block.
features.hypothesis: Sharing the backbone layer implementation may improve alignment, but it is a Feature only if the replacement changes structural semantics or numerical behavior.
features.design: Clone the transformer config for HLM depth, instantiate TransformerBlock with the OLMo3 layer spec and forward HLM RoPE explicitly; retain this as a conditional proposal pending equivalence review.

delta.summary: Run HLM layers through the configured OLMo3 TransformerBlock instead of a separate custom causal block.

operations.before: custom ConceptCausalBlock list with standalone LayerNorm
operations.after: TransformerBlock using the configured OLMo3 layer spec and final norm
operations.rationale: Record the replacement while preserving the explicit downgrade-to-evidence condition.

analysis.conclusion: The implementation replacement is clear; whether it is a structural Feature or semantically equivalent implementation evidence is unresolved.
limitations: No numerical parity or training A/B artifact.
Downgrade to D04b implementation evidence if algorithm review confirms structural and numerical equivalence.

evidence.summary: Replaces the custom HLM causal block with Megatron TransformerBlock using the OLMo3 layer spec.
ConceptPredictorV21.hlm_block and HLM rotary embedding integration.

features.title_zh: HLM 层实现换成 OLMo3 标准 TransformerBlock
features.summary_zh: 将 HLM 每层从自定义 ConceptCausalBlock 替换为 OLMo3 layer spec 的标准 TransformerBlock，并统一 final norm；若确认结构语义与数值等价，应降级为 HLM 节点的实现 evidence。

features.title: Chunk-level concept representation
features.summary: Construct one continuous concept vector from each four-token chunk, using mean pooling and shifted reinjection semantics.
features.hypothesis: A lower-rate continuous representation can summarize local token groups while keeping the model well-defined without quantization.
features.design: Group token states into four-token chunks, mean-pool each chunk and shift/repeat concept states for fusion; these parameters do not become child Features.

delta.summary: Construct one continuous concept vector from each four-token chunk, using mean pooling and shifted reinjection semantics.

operations.rationale: The representation is independently removable; its parameter choices remain inside one Feature.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

analysis.conclusion: The continuous chunk representation is implemented; its isolated effect and exact shift semantics remain unverified.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

evidence.summary: The first available repository commit is an aggregated ConceptLM V2/V2.1/V2.2-VQ snapshot; it supports six independently reviewed structures without exposing separate introduction commits or ablation results.
ConceptLMV2Model._merge_token_chunks constructs four-token mean-pooled concept states.
ConceptLMV2Model._repeat_shift_concepts implements shifted concept reinjection.

features.summary_zh: 每 4 个连续 token 的隐状态经 mean pooling 形成一个连续 concept 向量，并通过 shift feature 控制其回注时序；chunk size、pooling 方式与 shift 均保留在本节点内。

features.title: Product-VQ concept discretization
features.summary: Discretize continuous chunk concepts with product vector quantization using 32 codebooks of 128 entries.
features.hypothesis: A discrete compositional concept bottleneck can improve high-level modeling while allowing VQ removal to recover the continuous representation.
features.design: Normalize each concept, quantize it through 32 codebooks with 128 entries each and train the HLM against the quantized path; codebook parameters stay within this Feature.

delta.summary: Discretize continuous chunk concepts with product vector quantization using 32 codebooks of 128 entries.

operations.before: continuous chunk concept vectors without VQ
operations.rationale: VQ is an optional structural layer whose removal returns the continuous parent state.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

code_symbols.summary: ConceptLMV22VQModel.__init__ and the VQ concept branch implement Product VQ and its losses.

analysis.conclusion: Product VQ is independently identifiable, but no VQ-versus-continuous ablation result is committed.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

evidence.summary: The first available repository commit is an aggregated ConceptLM V2/V2.1/V2.2-VQ snapshot; it supports six independently reviewed structures without exposing separate introduction commits or ablation results.

features.summary_zh: 在连续 concept 向量上叠加 Product VQ：向量切分为 32 段，每段在 128 词条码本中选择码字；码本数量和大小作为节点内参数。

features.title: Self-DD intra-module cross-layer reads
features.summary: Let layers inside a module read earlier layer outputs in addition to the immediately preceding state.
features.hypothesis: Learned access to earlier layer states can improve information reuse beyond a strictly sequential residual stack.
features.design: Use V21SelfDD and V21DepthDD to select and mix same-module history states independently of cross-module residual routes.

delta.summary: Let layers inside a module read earlier layer outputs in addition to the immediately preceding state.

operations.before: each layer consumes only the immediately preceding hidden state
operations.after: V21SelfDD/V21DepthDD read and mix stacked earlier outputs within the same module
operations.rationale: Same-module history reads are independently switchable and are the direct parent of D09.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

analysis.conclusion: Self-DD is independently configured in code, but its isolated effect and the exact expansion of DD require algorithm-owner confirmation.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

evidence.summary: The first available repository commit is an aggregated ConceptLM V2/V2.1/V2.2-VQ snapshot; it supports six independently reviewed structures without exposing separate introduction commits or ablation results.
V21SelfDD controls same-module history reads.
V21DepthDD mixes stacked previous-layer states.

features.title: Cumsum self-DD state
features.summary: Replace full same-module layer-history self-DD with a recurrent cumsum state across encoder, HLM and decoder paths.
features.hypothesis: A single accumulated state can retain depth context with lower history storage and simpler route shapes.
features.design: Introduce V21SelfCumsumDD, preserve initialization ordering and switch same-module DD paths to cumsum mode by configuration.

delta.summary: Replace full same-module layer-history self-DD with a recurrent cumsum state across encoder, HLM and decoder paths.

operations.after: normalized recurrent cumsum state with learned per-layer mixing
operations.rationale: Change the mathematical state and memory shape while preserving D06a as the direct baseline.

analysis.conclusion: Implementation and A/B intent are pinned; performance and model-quality conclusions remain unresolved.
limitations: The A/B commit contains a launcher but no result or log artifact.

evidence.summary: Introduces V21SelfCumsumDD as a recurrent single-state alternative to full layer-history self-DD.
Applies cumsum mode across encoder, HLM and decoder DD paths with single-source exports.
Adds an all-DD cumsum A/B submission, but no result artifact is committed.

features.title: Cross-module residual-read routes
features.summary: Add routes that let HLM read encoder intermediates and decoder layers read encoder or HLM intermediates.
features.hypothesis: Later modules can benefit from direct learned access to intermediate states produced by earlier modules.
features.design: Expose encoder and concept/HLM histories as route sources and mix them through V21ResidualFlowRouteAdd with independent route-builder switches.

delta.summary: Add routes that let HLM read encoder intermediates and decoder layers read encoder or HLM intermediates.

operations.before: no learned reads of intermediate states across encoder, HLM and decoder modules
operations.after: HLM reads encoder histories; decoder reads encoder and HLM histories through residual routes
operations.rationale: Cross-module reads are independently switchable from Self-DD and are the direct parent of D10.

commits.summary: Shared aggregated history starting point; not a unique introduction commit for this Feature.

analysis.conclusion: Cross-module residual-read routes are explicit and independently configurable, but their isolated effect is unverified.
limitations: No isolated parent-relative ablation artifact is available.
The initial commit is shared with five other reviewed base mechanisms.

features.title: Cross-module cumsum routes
features.summary: Expose cumsum states as single-source encoder/HLM/decoder route inputs instead of retaining multi-layer source histories.
features.hypothesis: Cross-module residual reads can retain useful information while using one stable accumulated source per module.
features.design: Add module route exports and update concept-read-encoder, decoder-read-encoder and decoder-read-concept source selection independently of same-module cumsum state.

delta.summary: Expose cumsum states as single-source encoder/HLM/decoder route inputs instead of retaining multi-layer source histories.

operations.after: one cumsum route export per module
operations.rationale: D10 changes cross-module source semantics and therefore builds only on D06b.

features.title: Canonical Stage-1 scale and resume workflow
features.summary: Package the Concept configuration into a canonical large-scale Stage-1 launcher with full-state save/resume probes and independent training health monitoring.
features.hypothesis: A reproducible launcher, checkpoint policy and health signals are required before the architecture can be treated as a trainable model state.
features.design: Separate reusable model config from launch wrappers, define a 256-GPU Stage-1 entrypoint, add MFU/save-resume probes and capture route/VQ/rank/grad-update health independently of checkpoint cadence.

delta.summary: Package the Concept configuration into a canonical large-scale Stage-1 launcher with full-state save/resume probes and independent training health monitoring.

operations.before: ad-hoc public bench and A/B submission scripts
operations.after: canonical Stage-1 launcher sourcing one reusable Concept config
operations.rationale: Make the intended scale-up state explicit and reproducible.

operations.before: no dedicated full-state probe or Concept grad/update records
operations.after: full-state save/resume smoke plus route/VQ/rank/grad-update monitoring
operations.rationale: Detect inactive paths and verify recovery mechanics before long training.

commits.summary: Reusable config and thin compatibility launcher.

analysis.conclusion: Short operational smokes support the workflow, but full Stage-1 convergence and checkpoint content remain unresolved.

Checkpoint references are internal paths without content-addressed model hashes.

features.title: Segmented Concept inference runtime
features.summary: Add a checkpoint-safe custom inference runtime with separate encoder, HLM and decoder cache domains and a GPU-only batched decode loop.
features.hypothesis: ConceptLM can decode incrementally only if token and chunk-rate state are cached according to its segmented topology rather than stock OLMo assumptions.
features.design: Load the original Megatron checkpoint strictly, maintain three coordinated cache domains, refresh HLM state at chunk boundaries and expose a batched GPU-only inferencer API.

delta.summary: Add a checkpoint-safe custom inference runtime with separate encoder, HLM and decoder cache domains and a GPU-only batched decode loop.

operations.before: training-only full-prefix Concept forward; stock runtime incompatible
operations.after: custom SegmentedConceptKV plus GPU-only batched token decode
operations.rationale: Respect encoder/HLM/decoder state boundaries without mutating the source checkpoint.

commits.summary: Segmented cache prototype and benchmark harness.

experiments.title: Teacher-forced segmented-KV reference
experiments.summary: Top-1 matched at all 32 checked positions for 12-, 256- and 1024-token prompts while the checkpoint metadata remained unchanged.

analysis.conclusion: The custom runtime is operational and checkpoint-safe, but free generation is not bitwise equivalent for every prompt.
limitations: A short-prompt free run diverged after numerical differences accumulated.
Stock vLLM serving remains unsupported.

evidence.summary: Adds three-domain segmented KV cache inference and checkpoint-safe benchmarks.
Moves decode into a GPU-only batched token loop and optimizes segmented cache updates.
Teacher-forced top-1 matches at 12/256/1024 prompt lengths; short free generation is not bitwise equivalent.
SegmentedConceptKV and ConceptKVCaches coordinate encoder, HLM and decoder cache domains.

features.title: Strict model-only HF export

features.hypothesis: A model-only artifact can support downstream tooling if custom architecture identity and key validation remain explicit.
features.design: Map the Megatron distributed checkpoint into custom ConceptLM HF keys, reject unexpected/missing model state and keep runtime compatibility probes separate.

operations.after: strict custom ConceptLM Hugging Face model-only export

The artifact does not make stock vLLM compatible with ConceptLM.

evidence.summary: Adds strict model-only Hugging Face export and its launcher.

features.title: Variable-length compiled batching
features.summary: Generalize the segmented runtime from fixed/equal-length batches to request-local variable lengths with stable route compilation and throughput gates.
features.hypothesis: Separating logical request lengths from padded precision shapes can enable true batching without recompiling routes per prompt length.
features.design: Add request-local varlen cache state, FlashAttention varlen prefill with Flash Decode disabled, dynamic route compile reuse, explicit precision lengths and fixed-batch throughput benchmarks.

delta.summary: Generalize the segmented runtime from fixed/equal-length batches to request-local variable lengths with stable route compilation and throughput gates.

operations.before: fixed or equal-length batch cache contract
operations.after: request-local variable lengths with shared dense token caches and stable compiled route plans
operations.rationale: Support heterogeneous prompts while containing shape-driven recompilation and preserving route semantics.

experiments.title: Variable-length runtime smoke
experiments.summary: PR validation reports the true varlen path and inferencer API completing with checkpoint mutation disabled.

analysis.conclusion: The variable-length path is implemented and smoke-validated under its safe contract; broad workload equivalence is not established.
limitations: Flash Decode is intentionally excluded from random varlen batching.
The committed evidence does not provide a full matrix of batch-size/length numerical parity.

evidence.summary: Adds batched decode stability gates before generalizing request lengths.
Adds request-local variable-length state and a FlashAttention varlen batch path with Flash Decode disabled.
Avoids recompiling routes for each prompt length and adds compile-shape diagnostics.
Separates logical request lengths from precision/padded batch lengths.
Adds a fixed-batch steady-state throughput benchmark.

features.title: Flash Decode repair and evaluation
features.summary: Repair missing HLM rotary inputs in Flash Decode, then evaluate speed, task accuracy and numerical/generation drift with deterministic sharded GSM8K.
features.hypothesis: Flash Decode may improve throughput after the HLM RoPE fix, but must remain gated if numerical drift changes autoregressive trajectories.
features.design: Add a dedicated diagnosis path, restore HLM rotary state, run matched Flash-off/on long-context and eight-shard GSM8K comparisons, and default Flash Decode off when equivalence is not supported.

delta.summary: Repair missing HLM rotary inputs in Flash Decode, then evaluate speed, task accuracy and numerical/generation drift with deterministic sharded GSM8K.

operations.before: HLM rotary input missing; unstable path without a task-level correctness gate
operations.after: rotary path repaired, deterministic A/B evaluation added, feature remains disabled by default
operations.rationale: Treat speed and correctness as separate claims and preserve the safer runtime default.

experiments.title: Flash Decode GSM8K paired evaluation
experiments.summary: Aggregate strict accuracy was similar and makespan improved, but full generations and logits were not equivalent.

analysis.conclusion: The speed claim is supported, but numerical and generation equivalence is not; Flash Decode should remain off by default for output-sensitive use.
limitations: One GSM8K A/B cannot establish universal quality neutrality.
Long-context top-1 agreement coexists with large relative-logit drift.
Flash Decode does not satisfy the random variable-length batch contract.

evidence.summary: Restores HLM rotary inputs in the Flash Decode path and adds diagnosis tooling.
Adds deterministic sharded Flash-on/off GSM8K evaluation.
Documents safe defaults and the evidence-based Flash Decode decision.
PR #1 integration commit for the inference branch.
Immutable main merge revision observed for this analysis.
Reports 522/1319 vs 525/1319 strict GSM8K, 1.106x makespan speedup, but only 817/1319 identical generations.

feat-concept-segmented-topology.reason: Human review separates the five-stage information-flow skeleton from representation, quantization and route dimensions; the shared snapshot is evidence, not the boundary.

primary_locators.role: Implement the segmented encoder, chunk, HLM, fusion and decoder topology.

validation.comparison: Standard single-stream OLMo3 Transformer versus the five-stage segmented topology.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: The topology is pinned and independently reviewable; its effect is unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
No isolated quality or efficiency result.

feat-concept-hlm-predictor.reason: ConceptPredictorV2 is an independently configurable HLM module and the semantic parent of D07 and D08.

primary_locators.role: Implement the concept-rate autoregressive HLM predictor.

validation.comparison: Segmented topology without a concept-rate predictor versus ConceptPredictorV2.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: The HLM module is pinned; its parent-relative effect is unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
No HLM ablation result.

feat-concept-chunk-representation.reason: Chunk-rate continuous representation is independently removable; chunk=4, mean pooling and shift remain parameters of the same Feature.

primary_locators.role: Construct four-token mean-pooled continuous concept states.
Apply shifted concept reinjection semantics.

validation.comparison: No chunk-rate representation versus continuous four-token mean-pooled concepts with shifted reinjection.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: The representation and its parameters are pinned; effect and exact shift semantics are unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
No chunk/pooling/shift ablation result.

feat-concept-product-vq.reason: Product VQ is an optional discretization layer over the continuous D05a parent; 32 codebooks by 128 entries remain internal parameters.

primary_locators.role: Implement Product VQ and its HLM/VQ loss path.

validation.comparison: Continuous D05a concepts versus Product-VQ-discretized concepts.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated VQ A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: The VQ bottleneck is pinned and independently removable; its effect is unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
No continuous-versus-VQ result.

feat-concept-self-dd.reason: Same-module history reads are independently switchable from cross-module routes; semantic-preserving compiled fastpaths are implementation evidence.

primary_locators.role: Implement same-module cross-layer history reads and mixing.

validation.comparison: Sequential layers reading only the previous state versus same-module stacked-history reads.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: Self-DD is pinned and independently switchable; its effect is unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
DD acronym expansion and isolated result need algorithm-owner confirmation.

feat-concept-cross-module-residual-read.reason: Cross-module route builders and V21ResidualFlowRouteAdd define a separate ablatable information-flow dimension; route fastpaths remain evidence.

primary_locators.role: Implement learned cross-module residual reads.
Build encoder-to-HLM and encoder/HLM-to-decoder route sources.

validation.comparison: No intermediate-state reads across modules versus learned encoder/HLM/decoder residual-read routes.
validation.conditions: Retrospective inspection of the shared initial snapshot; no isolated A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: Cross-module routes are pinned and independently switchable; their effect is unverified.
limitations: Shared snapshot does not reveal a separate introduction time.
No route ablation result.

feat-concept-hlm-backbone-window.reason: Implementation and default flip jointly establish one attention mechanism.

primary_locators.role: Implement HLM sliding-window attention.
Select backbone_window as the default.

validation.comparison: Full causal HLM attention versus backbone sliding/full attention cadence.
validation.conditions: No isolated A/B run is committed.
validation.conclusion: Mechanism and default are pinned; effect is unverified.
limitations: No quality, memory or throughput comparison.

feat-concept-hlm-olmo3-layer-reuse.reason: Conditional sibling of D07 under D04b; downgrade to D04b implementation evidence if custom and OLMo3 blocks are structurally and numerically equivalent.

primary_locators.role: Replace custom HLM blocks with the configured OLMo3 TransformerBlock.

validation.comparison: Custom ConceptCausalBlock HLM versus shared OLMo3 TransformerBlock implementation.
validation.conditions: Patch inspection; no parity or training A/B artifact.
validation.conclusion: Implementation replacement is clear; Feature status depends on unresolved structural/numerical equivalence.
limitations: No checkpoint migration or numerical parity result.
If equivalent, downgrade this proposal to D04b implementation evidence.

conditional_review.question: Are ConceptCausalBlock and the OLMo3 TransformerBlock path structurally and numerically equivalent under the same HLM configuration?
conditional_review.if_equivalent: Downgrade D08 to implementation evidence of feat-concept-hlm-predictor.
conditional_review.if_not_equivalent: Retain D08 as a sibling of D07 under feat-concept-hlm-predictor.

feat-concept-cumsum-self-dd.reason: Core recurrent state and all-module application form one mechanism; the A/B launcher is evidence only.

primary_locators.role: Replace full layer-history self-DD with recurrent cumsum state.
Apply cumsum state across encoder/HLM/decoder paths.

validation.comparison: Full previous-layer history DD versus one recurrent cumsum state.
validation.conditions: A/B submission script exists but no result artifact.
validation.conclusion: Architecture is implemented; effect is unverified.
limitations: No memory, speed, loss or quality result from the planned A/B.

feat-concept-cross-module-cumsum-routes.reason: Cross-module source semantics build only on D06b; similarity to D09 does not make D09 the parent.

primary_locators.role: Expose and consume single cumsum sources across encoder, concept and decoder modules.

validation.comparison: Cross-module reads over per-layer histories versus one cumsum source per module.
validation.conditions: Code and submission-path review; no A/B result.
validation.conclusion: Routing semantics are explicit; effect is unverified.
limitations: No route-quality, throughput or convergence comparison.

feat-concept-stage1-scale-resume.reason: A reproducible training configuration branch on the routed Concept model; short smokes do not validate full training effect.

primary_locators.role: Define the canonical 256-H200 Stage-1 resource and checkpoint workflow.
Bind model, optimizer and route configuration consumed by the launcher.

validation.comparison: Routed Concept model without a canonical scale/recovery plan versus 256-H200 Stage-1 plus full-state resume and monitoring.
validation.conditions: Short 2/4-step monitoring smokes; not a full Stage-1 run.
validation.conclusion: Short health smokes support implementation integrity but do not validate the training configuration's model effect.
limitations: No completed Stage-1 convergence or checkpoint-content artifact.

feat-concept-segmented-inference-runtime.reason: The custom cache domains and GPU batched decode are one runtime capability, independent of Stage-1 launch configuration.

primary_locators.role: Maintain separate encoder, HLM and decoder cache domains.
Expose GPU-only batched decode.

validation.comparison: Full-prefix Concept forward versus segmented-KV incremental decode.
validation.conditions: One H200; greedy 32-token decode at prompt lengths 12, 256 and 1024; strict checkpoint metadata fingerprinting.
validation.conclusion: Incremental runtime works and can be faster, but generation is not universally equivalent.
limitations: Single-device limited prompt set.
Stock vLLM serving unsupported.

feat-concept-strict-hf-export.reason: Potential deployment capability, but currently close to a pure export and lacks an artifact/reload result.

primary_locators.role: Export a custom model-only Hugging Face artifact with strict key checks.

validation.comparison: Megatron distributed checkpoint only versus a custom HF model-only export path.
validation.conditions: Exporter code/launcher only; no content-addressed export and reload artifact.
validation.conclusion: Deployment value is plausible but not demonstrated; admission remains ambiguous.
limitations: Could be evidence-only pure export.
No artifact digest or independent reload result.

feat-concept-variable-length-batching.reason: Varlen state and shape-stable execution build directly on the segmented runtime, not HF export.

primary_locators.role: Maintain request-local state for heterogeneous prompt lengths.
Measure and constrain prompt-length route recompilation.

validation.comparison: Fixed/equal-length segmented batches versus request-local variable-length batches.
validation.conditions: Implementation and smoke claims with Flash Decode disabled; no full parity matrix.
validation.conclusion: Runtime mode is implemented but parent-relative behavior/effect remains insufficiently measured.
limitations: No broad batch-size/length numerical parity metrics.
Flash Decode is outside this contract.

feat-concept-flash-decode-evaluation.reason: A distinct mixed runtime mode branching from segmented inference; it is incompatible with random varlen batching.

primary_locators.role: Diagnose long-context Flash Decode numerical behavior.
Run deterministic sharded GSM8K Flash on/off evaluation.

validation.comparison: Segmented runtime with Flash Decode off versus repaired Flash Decode on.
validation.conditions: Eight matched H200 GSM8K shards plus long-context numerical gates.
validation.conclusion: Faster with neutral aggregate accuracy in one run, but logits and generations are not equivalent; keep default off.
limitations: Not compatible with random variable-length batching.
One task A/B is not universal quality evidence.

superseded_feature_ids.reason: The aggregated snapshot node mixed six independently ablatable structural dimensions.
